AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class ConventionViewLocator

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Resolves a WPF Window type for a given ViewModel type using a naming/namespace convention.

public sealed class ConventionViewLocator : IViewLocator
Inheritance
object
ConventionViewLocator
Implements
IViewLocator
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
Extension Methods
UnitExtensions.ToUnitLabel(object)
ReflectionUtils.GetHighlightProperty(object)
ReflectionUtils.SetPropertyValue(object, PropertyInfo, object)
SystemExtensions.Cast<T>(object)

Remarks

The convention assumes ViewModels live under a .ModelViews. namespace segment and Views live under the corresponding .Views. segment, and that ViewModel types end with ViewModel while view types end with View. For example:

AccoRevit.Addin.ModelViews.FooViewModel → AccoRevit.Addin.Views.FooView.

Resolved mappings are cached per ViewModel type using a thread-safe dictionary.

Constructors

ConventionViewLocator(ILogger<ConventionViewLocator>)

Initializes a new instance of the ConventionViewLocator class.

public ConventionViewLocator(ILogger<ConventionViewLocator> logger = null)

Parameters

logger ILogger<ConventionViewLocator>

Optional logger for diagnostic output when view resolution fails.

Methods

GetViewType(Type)

Gets the WPF view type (Window) corresponding to the provided ViewModel type.

public Type GetViewType(Type viewModelType)

Parameters

viewModelType Type

The ViewModel CLR type.

Returns

Type

The resolved view type.

Remarks

Resolution results are cached. Subsequent calls for the same ViewModel type return the cached mapping.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when viewModelType is null.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the ViewModel type has no FullName, when the view type cannot be found, or when the resolved type is not a Window.
